artifacts.title: Component patterns: card
artifacts.content:
Card: Container for grouped related content
Carousel: Rotating set of slides or cards (content slider)

artifacts.title: Font candidates + pairing rules
artifacts.content:
Inter (professional, weights 100,200,300,400,500,600,700,800,900)
Poppins (friendly, weights 100,200,300,400,500,600,700,800,900)
Crimson Text (elegant, weights 400,600)
Space Mono (monospace, weights 400,700)

Pairing rules:
Pair serif heading with sans-serif body for classic + modern blend
Stick to 1-2 font families maximum to avoid visual noise
Ensure 1.25+ size ratio between heading and body for clear hierarchy
Use geometric sans-serif for clean, minimal brands
Use text serif for editorial, elegant, or premium personality

artifacts.title: Icon source libraries + selection protocol
artifacts.content:
APPROVED ICON LIBRARIES (one per project, no cross-library mixing except animated/static parent pairs):

- Heroicons (heroicons) [static] - ~300 icons - Clean UI chrome, nav, actions - repo: tailwindlabs/heroicons
- Lucide (lucide) [static] - ~1500 icons - General purpose, broadest coverage - repo: lucide-icons/lucide
- Tabler (tabler) [static] - ~5400 icons - Largest set, edge-case coverage - repo: tabler/tabler-icons
- Bootstrap Icons (bootstrap-icons) [static] - ~2000 icons - Familiar web conventions - repo: twbs/icons
- Phosphor (phosphor) [static] - ~7000 icons - Weight flexibility (6 weights), illustration-adjacent - repo: phosphor-icons/core - variants: thin, light, regular, bold, fill, duotone
- Material Symbols (material-symbols) [static] - ~3000 icons - Variable font, 3 fills, 7 grades, Material convention - repo: google/material-design-icons - variants: outlined, rounded, sharp - each with fill 0/1, weight 100-700, grade -25/0/200, optical-size 20-48
- Lucide Animated (lucide-animated) [animated] - ~1000 icons - Micro-interactions, state transitions (React + Framer Motion) - repo: pqoqubbw/icons
- Heroicons Animated (heroicons-animated) [animated] - ~300 icons - Polished interactive states (React + Framer Motion) - repo: heroicons-animated/heroicons-animated

SELECTION PROTOCOL:
1. Check DESIGN.md first - if the project specifies an icon library, use that exclusively. Project consistency trumps individual icon quality.
2. If no project preference, match the tech stack. React + framer-motion installed -> animated tier eligible. Vanilla HTML or non-React -> static SVG only.
3. If the project already uses icons from a specific library (grep imports), use the same one - one library per project, no exceptions.
4. Search by semantic intent (what the icon means in context), not visual shape. "home" not "house"; "close" or "dismiss" not "circle with X".
5. Copy SVG path data verbatim from the library source. Never redraw, simplify, optimize, or approximate paths. Byte-for-byte equality with the library source is the rule.
6. Animated variants ONLY when the icon represents a state change or feedback moment - never for static UI chrome. Animated icons must pair with their static parent library (Lucide + Lucide Animated, Heroicons + Heroicons Animated). No other cross-library mixing.
7. Annotate every placed icon with a provenance marker: class="<library>-<name>", data-icon-source="<library>", or <!-- source: <library>/<filename> --> comment. The taste-validator (taste/fabricated-svg rule) enforces this on commit.

PROVENANCE MARKERS REQUIRED (taste/fabricated-svg rule enforces these):
- Heroicons: class="heroicon-*" OR data-icon-source="heroicons" OR <!-- source: heroicons/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Lucide: class="lucide-*" OR data-icon-source="lucide" OR <!-- source: lucide/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Tabler: class="tabler-*" OR data-icon-source="tabler" OR <!-- source: tabler/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Bootstrap Icons: class="bi-*" OR data-icon-source="bootstrap-icons" OR <!-- source: bootstrap-icons/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Phosphor: class="ph-*" OR data-icon-source="phosphor" OR <!-- source: phosphor/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Material Symbols: class="ms-*" OR data-icon-source="material-symbols" OR <!-- source: material-symbols/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Lucide Animated: class="lucide-*" OR data-icon-source="lucide-animated" OR <!-- source: lucide-animated/<icon-name>.svg -->
- Heroicons Animated: class="heroicon-*" OR data-icon-source="heroicons-animated" OR <!-- source: heroicons-animated/<icon-name>.svg -->

artifacts.title: Motion easings (restrained)
artifacts.content:
ease-out-quad: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) (150ms, feedback)
ease-in-quad: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) (120ms, exit)

warnings: design-references: no live catalog match for voice "modern clear focused usability"
